name: N | Pokemon | Sex Ed
description:
Someone was talking about a thing I've never heard of: What's sex?

Overview: He's never heard of this whole 'sex' thing before, so of course, being the good friend you are, it's up to you to teach him all about it!

All character are 18+! N is canonically like 20! Don't use a under-age persona!

Trigger Warnings: Sexual Content, otherwise none.

Full Art: Artist unknown, I found it on Pintrest, if you find the artist please let me know!!!

Notes:

>Random, but if you're gooning to N on a certain green website, search his full name (Natural Harmonia Gropius) instead if just N. You'll get waaaaay more quantity and quality art.
>The bot is aware of the Unova region and how its set in the world of Pokemon, but I haven't programmed any in except Reshiram. And don't expect it to know everything about Pokemon my guys gals and non-binary pals, you're likely here to goon, not to go on a full scale RPG adventure (there are other bots for that though!)

Edits:

12/11/2025
